description: Build a super minimalistic tic-tac-toe game in plain JavaScript that runs in the browser.

userStories.title: Create a minimal browser app shell
userStories.description: As a player, I need a barebones HTML, CSS, and JavaScript setup so the game loads in a browser without any framework.
acceptanceCriteria: App uses plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript only
Page renders a centered game container with a 3x3 board mount point
No build step is required to run the game locally

userStories.title: Implement tic-tac-toe interactions
userStories.description: As a player, I want to click squares to alternate between X and O so I can play a full game.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an empty cell places the current player's mark
Game state is managed in JavaScript

userStories.title: Show win or draw state
userStories.description: As a player, I want the game to detect wins and draws so the round ends correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: All standard tic-tac-toe win lines are detected
A status label shows the winner or a draw message
Board input stops after a win or draw

userStories.title: Add a simple restart control
userStories.description: As a player, I want to restart the board instantly so I can play again.
acceptanceCriteria: A reset button clears the board and status
The next round always starts with X
